Agree. I would add another point to support my agreement—that chylomicrons undergo rapid metabolism soon after ingestion, often before reaching sufficient concentration to show any noticeable migration pattern under standard electrophoretic conditions. This makes them even more distinct among the given choices. Thus, reiterating the importance of their low apolipoprotein content and fast clearance rate reinforces the conclusion. Therefore, the correct answer remains \( \boxed{D} \). ```plaintext
